name: claude-code-companion
description: Use Claude Code from Codex for read-only review, diagnosis, and planning.

interface.shortDescription: Ask Claude Code for read-only second-model help
interface.longDescription: Claude Code Companion lets Codex start local Claude Code review, adversarial review, diagnosis, and planning jobs. It uses the user's local Claude Code CLI and keeps v1 read-only by default.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude Code to review my current diff
Run a Claude adversarial review before shipping
Ask Claude for a read-only diagnosis
